mapper.insert: insert into batch.result_version ( tenant_id, business_key, version_no, job_instance_id, status, effective_at, deactivated_at, payload_storage, payload_json, payload_ref, generated_at, generated_by, promotion_policy, approval_id, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{businessKey}, #{versionNo}, #{jobInstanceId}, #{status}, #{effectiveAt}, #{deactivatedAt}, #{payloadStorage}, #{payloadJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{payloadRef}, #{generatedAt}, #{generatedBy}, #{promotionPolicy}, #{approvalId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
